components.TextField: Single-line text input for collecting short answers.
components.MultilineTextField: Multi-line text area for collecting longer text answers.
components.NumberField: Numeric input for collecting whole or decimal numbers.
components.EmailAddressField: Text input validated as an email address.
components.TelephoneNumberField: Text input for collecting telephone numbers.
components.DatePartsField: Three separate inputs (day, month, year) for collecting full dates.
components.MonthYearField: Two inputs (month, year) for collecting partial dates.
components.YesNoField: A pair of radio buttons offering a yes/no choice.
components.RadiosField: Radio buttons allowing the user to select one option from a named list.
components.CheckboxesField: Checkboxes allowing the user to select one or more options from a named list.
components.SelectField: A dropdown select element for choosing one option from a named list.
components.AutocompleteField: Text input with autocomplete suggestions sourced from a named list.
components.UkAddressField: Structured address input for collecting UK postal addresses.
components.FileUploadField: File upload control integrated with the CDP file upload service.
components.DeclarationField: A checkbox the user must tick to confirm a declaration before proceeding.
components.HiddenField: A non-visible field that stores a fixed value in form state without user input.
components.PaymentField: Redirects the user to GOV.UK Pay to collect a payment before proceeding.
components.Html: Display static HTML content on a page without collecting user input.
components.Markdown: Display content authored in Markdown, rendered to HTML at runtime.
components.InsetText: Display highlighted inset text using the GOV.UK inset text component.
components.Details: Display content inside a collapsible disclosure element.
components.List: Display a GOV.UK-styled list sourced from a named list definition.
components.EastingNorthingField: Paired numeric inputs for collecting British National Grid easting and northing coordinates.
components.OsGridRefField: Text input for collecting an Ordnance Survey grid reference.
components.NationalGridFieldNumberField: Numeric input for a single National Grid coordinate component.
components.LatLongField: Paired decimal inputs for collecting WGS84 latitude and longitude coordinates.
components.GeospatialField: Composite location picker supporting multiple geospatial coordinate formats.

pages.PageController: The default page type. Displays a set of components and advances to the next page on submission. Omit the `controller` property to use this page type.
pages.StartPageController: The entry page of the form. Initialises the session and redirects to the first question. Must use the path `/start`.
pages.TerminalPageController: A dead-end page that does not route the user to another page. Use this for outcomes where the journey ends without proceeding to the summary — for example, an ineligibility screen.
pages.RepeatPageController: Allows the user to add multiple sets of answers to the same group of questions. Answers are stored as an array under the key defined by `repeat.options.name`.
pages.FileUploadPageController: A question page that handles file upload via the CDP file upload service. Must contain a `FileUploadField` component.
pages.SummaryPageController: Displays a check-your-answers summary of all form responses before submission. Must use the path `/summary`.

properties.required: Whether the field must be filled in. Defaults to `true`.
properties.optionalText: When `true`, appends '(optional)' to the field label.
properties.classes: Additional CSS classes applied to the component.
properties.customValidationMessage: A single custom message shown for any validation error on this field.
properties.customValidationMessages: A map of Joi error codes to custom error messages.
properties.instructionText: Alternative text read by screen readers in place of the field title.
properties.condition: Name of a condition that controls whether this component is shown.
properties.rows: Number of rows for the textarea. Defaults to 5.
properties.maxWords: Maximum number of words permitted in the text area.
properties.hideTitle: When `true`, hides the component or section title.
properties.usePostcodeLookup: When `true`, enables a postcode lookup integration.
properties.maxDaysInPast: Maximum number of days in the past the entered date can be.
properties.maxDaysInFuture: Maximum number of days in the future the entered date can be.
properties.bold: When `true`, displays option labels in bold.
properties.type: Display style for the list: `'bulleted'` or `'numbered'`.
properties.accept: Comma-separated list of accepted MIME types (e.g. `'image/png,application/pdf'`).
properties.declarationConfirmationLabel: Custom label text for the declaration checkbox.
properties.description: Description shown on the GOV.UK Pay payment page.
properties.conditionalAmounts: Condition-based payment amounts. Each entry requires a `condition` name and `amount` in pence.
properties.emailField: Name of the form field containing the user's email address for the confirmation email.
properties.min: Minimum value, character length, word count, or file count.
properties.max: Maximum value, character length, word count, or file count.
properties.regex: Regular expression pattern the value must match.
properties.hint: Hint text displayed below the field label to help the user answer the question.
properties.list: Name of a list definition that provides the options to display. See [list schema](../../schemas/index.md#list-schema) for the list definition format.
properties.shortDescription: A short description of the field used in the check-your-answers summary.
properties.content: HTML or Markdown content to display.

FileUploadPageController: This controller works in conjunction with the CDP file upload service. See the [File Upload guide](../code-based/file-upload.md) for setup instructions, including the required `formSubmissionService` interface.

FileUploadField: This component is specifically designed to work with the CDP file upload service via the [File Upload Page](../pages/file-upload-page.md) controller — it must be used on a page using `FileUploadPageController`.
HiddenField: Hidden fields can be pre-populated from query string parameters — see [Pre-populating state](../code-based/pre-populate-state.md) for details.
EastingNorthingField: This component renders an inline Ordnance Survey map that lets users click a location to auto-populate the coordinate inputs. The map requires the `ordnanceSurveyApiKey` and `ordnanceSurveyApiSecret` [plugin options](../../plugin-options.md#geospatial-map) to be set — without them the component falls back to plain text inputs.
OsGridRefField: This component renders an inline Ordnance Survey map that lets users click a location to auto-populate the grid reference input. The map requires the `ordnanceSurveyApiKey` and `ordnanceSurveyApiSecret` [plugin options](../../plugin-options.md#geospatial-map) to be set — without them the component falls back to a plain text input.
NationalGridFieldNumberField: This component renders an inline Ordnance Survey map that lets users click a location to auto-populate the coordinate input. The map requires the `ordnanceSurveyApiKey` and `ordnanceSurveyApiSecret` [plugin options](../../plugin-options.md#geospatial-map) to be set — without them the component falls back to a plain text input.
LatLongField: This component renders an inline Ordnance Survey map that lets users click a location to auto-populate the latitude and longitude inputs. The map requires the `ordnanceSurveyApiKey` and `ordnanceSurveyApiSecret` [plugin options](../../plugin-options.md#geospatial-map) to be set — without them the component falls back to plain text inputs.
GeospatialField: This component renders an inline Ordnance Survey map that lets users click a location to auto-populate the coordinate inputs across multiple coordinate formats. The map requires the `ordnanceSurveyApiKey` and `ordnanceSurveyApiSecret` [plugin options](../../plugin-options.md#geospatial-map) to be set — without them the component falls back to plain text inputs.

pageProperties.components: Array of component definitions rendered on the page.
pageProperties.condition: Name of a condition that controls whether this page is shown.
pageProperties.controller: The page controller class name. Omit or use `"PageController"` for the default question page.
pageProperties.events: Lifecycle hooks that fire when the page is loaded or saved.
pageProperties.id: Stable identifier for the page, used internally by the form engine.
pageProperties.next: Array of routing links that define where the form goes after this page.
pageProperties.path: URL path segment for the page (e.g. `/details`).
pageProperties.section: Name of a section that groups this page in the form.
pageProperties.title: Heading displayed to the user at the top of the page.
pageProperties.view: Name of an alternative view template to render for this page.
pageProperties.repeat.options.name: Identifier for the repeatable section, used as the key in form state.
pageProperties.repeat.options.title: Label displayed per repeated item in the list summary.
pageProperties.repeat.schema.min: Minimum number of items the user must add.
pageProperties.repeat.schema.max: Maximum number of items the user can add. Cannot exceed 200.
